entity.name: hf-bot Core Team
entity.description: Open-source development collective dedicated to making CLI tools safer and more accessible for engineers using machine learning architectures.

projects.name: hf-bot Workspace Agent
projects.description: An open-source terminal developer agent and local sandbox workspace utility for safely validating Hugging Face repositories and automating local terminal workflows.

channels.name: Open Collective
channels.description: Support the hf-bot development collective safely through our transparent Open Collective fiscal hosting profile page.

channels.name: GitHub Sponsors
channels.description: Sponsor the core maintenance team directly through your personal or organizational GitHub account profiles.

channels.name: PayPal / Digital Providers
channels.description: Direct digital credit card processing channels can be utilized for one-time contributions. Contact kuyesu22@gmail.com to coordinate setup routing details.

plans.name: Proxy Infrastructure & Log Hosting
plans.description: Funding global API execution proxies, data persistence layers in MongoDB Atlas, and production server host nodes to scale the public Option A tier configuration.

plans.name: Advanced Feature Engineering
plans.description: Engineering advanced execution tools, implementing broader model support matrixes, and optimizing dynamic pre-flight caching layers to keep stream performance high.

plans.name: Security & Sandbox Hardening
plans.description: Auditing local shell runtime interception processes and strengthening user privacy constraints within the centralized proxy telemetry layers.
